category_sources: source_facts.description describes pre-commit as a framework for managing multi-language pre-commit hooks.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official pre-commit.com documentation use the display name pre-commit.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official pre-commit documentation site and includes installation, usage, configuration, and CLI reference sections.
repo_sources: Official pre-commit documentation links its project badge to https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit.
The official GitHub repository describes itself as the framework for managing multi-language pre-commit hooks.
tags_sources: Official pre-commit documentation covers Git hook installation, supported hooks, and CI usage.
source_facts.description says it manages multi-language pre-commit hooks.
